query: Detourmap: Every place worth the detour, on one interactive map review

results.title: Turn off the Eiffel Tower
results.content:
newsletter icon

July 19th, 2026

# Turn off the Eiffel Tower

## Turn off the Eiffel Tower

gm legends, happy Sunday.

Today: a world map with a filter that deletes famous places, open source comes for your $300 SEO bill, and a duck that knows that discount is fake.

## This map hides famous places

Alban (@flightmussy), whose whole Product Hunt bio is "creating stuff for fun," built Detourmap: one interactive map of 70,000 places pulled from Wikidata, from waterfalls and catacombs to 584 ghost towns, each ranked on a fame scale that runs from world-famous down to hidden gem. Free, no account, no ads. [...] 🔥 Our Take: Google Maps knows every one of these places and will never show them to you, because it ranks by popularity and popularity is a loop: famous places get the pins, the pins keep them famous. Detourmap's fame filter breaks the loop. Narrow it to hidden gems and the Eiffel Tower vanishes while a Soviet mining town on Svalbard stays. One commenter lost twenty minutes wandering Romanian castles. The whole dataset is downloadable and public domain. This is the good kind of internet.

## Ahrefs has an open source problem [...] 11
